Will spread

Uses

Late, long-flowering plant serves as excellent ground cover for sunny to partly shaded areas in the landscape
A good plant for interplanting with spring bulbs because foliage emerges late as the bulb foliage is dying back
Underplanting for shrubs

A decoction of the root has long been used as a popular domestic remedy for diarrhea", "dysentery", "etc and is also used to treat sore mouths", "cankers", "etc. The dried and powdered root is applied to old ulcers or piles."]
care.used_for_details: Used in making wreaths. The roots contain tannin and are powerfully astringent. A decoction of the root has long been used as a popular domestic remedy for diarrhea, dysentery, etc and is also used to treat sore mouths, cankers, etc. The dried and powdered root is applied to old ulcers or piles.

description: Limonium vulgare, called common sea-lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Limonium native to Atlantic parts of Europe from southwestern Sweden to southwestern Iberia, and introduced elsewhere.
